selectCompany: Select a company to view issues.

treeControl.pauseHelp: Pause this issue and its descendants. Agents will stop working on paused issues.
treeControl.resumeHelp: Resume this issue and its descendants. Agents will continue working on resumed issues.
treeControl.cancelHelp: Cancel this issue and its descendants. This action cannot be undone.
treeControl.restoreHelp: Restore this issue and its descendants.
treeControl.pauseWorkHelp: Pause active execution on this issue until an explicit resume.
treeControl.resumeWorkHelp: Release the active pause hold so this issue can continue.

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.stale: The issue state has changed. Please refresh and try again.

detail.composerHintWithAssignee: Sending this comment will wake {{name}} for triage while the subtree remains paused.
detail.composerHintNoAssignee: Assign an agent to wake them for triage while the subtree remains paused.
detail.subtreePauseDescription: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.
detail.issueExecutionHeld: Issue execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.
detail.pausedByAncestor: This issue is paused by ancestor
detail.resumeFromRootToDeliver: Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.
detail.cancelDestructiveWarning: Cancelling a subtree is destructive. Non-terminal issues will be marked cancelled, and running or queued work will be interrupted where possible.
detail.treeControlReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
detail.noAgentsEligibleToWake: No assigned agents are eligible to wake from this preview.
detail.wakeAssignedAgentsAfterOp: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
detail.productivityReviewTooltip: This task is a productivity review.

toast.unableToCancelComment: Unable to cancel the queued comment
toast.unableToAcceptTasks: Unable to accept the suggested tasks
toast.unableToRejectTasks: Unable to reject the suggested tasks
toast.interruptRequestedBody: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.
toast.unableToInterruptRun: Unable to interrupt the active run
toast.queuedCommentRestored: The queued message was restored to the composer.
toast.feedbackSavedFutureVotesWillShare: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
toast.feedbackSavedFutureVotesWillStayLocal: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local

errors.noActivePauseHold: No active subtree pause hold is available to resume.
